tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb

recommended.song_name: Every Time I Look At You

content:
* Guitar tuned down 1/2 step
*
[tab]* [ch]Gmaj7/B[/ch] x24030
* Bmadd11: x24430  [/tab]
*
* During the pre-chorus C and D are arpeggiated as Cmaj7, D6sus2:
* C5(maj7): x355x
* D6sus2: x57700


[Verse 1]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
